groundingNote: someone; someone of this kind can be a {urn:molecule-v0:man|man} [m], can be a {urn:molecule-v0:woman|woman} [m], can be a {urn:molecule-v0:child|child} [m]; someone of this kind is not something of another kind (not an animal, not a thing)
label: person
notes: PROVISIONAL (rules-1, PROPOSED-ASM-1190): authored to fill the named 'person' gap (ASM-1126).
